on release
	release_note{int} {release_note}  := EVENT_NOTE{int} {EVENT_NOTE} 
	release_id{int} {release_id}  := EVENT_ID{int} {EVENT_ID} 
	if((get_event_mark(release_id{int} {release_id} , MARK_1{int} {MARK_1} ){Builtin, None, get_event_mark} = 1) and (event_id{int} {event_id}  = release_id{int} {release_id} ))
		message("release group triggered"){Builtin, None, message}
		if(is_attack{int} {is_attack}  = 0)
			message("no attack"){Builtin, None, message}
			release_id{int} {release_id}  := play_note(get_event_par(event_id{int} {event_id} , EVENT_PAR_NOTE{int} {EVENT_PAR_NOTE} ){Builtin, None, get_event_par}, EVENT_VELOCITY{int} {EVENT_VELOCITY} , 0, 0){Builtin, None, play_note}
			set_event_par_arr(release_id{int} {release_id} , EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int} {EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP} , 0, ALL_GROUPS{int} {ALL_GROUPS} ){Builtin, None, set_event_par_arr}
			i{int} {i}  := 0
			while(i{int} {i}  <= (NUM_DYNAMIC_LAYER{int} {NUM_DYNAMIC_LAYER}  - 1)) 
				set_event_par_arr(release_id{int} {release_id} , EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int} {EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP} , 1, i{int} {i}  + sus_rls_group{int} {sus_rls_group} ){Builtin, None, set_event_par_arr}
				inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None, inc}
			end while
		end if
		fade_out(event_id{int} {event_id} , 200000, 1){Builtin, None, fade_out}
		release_note{int} {release_note}  := event_note{int} {event_note} 
		if(- sh_right(abs(development[0]{int} {development}  - 22714){Builtin, None, abs} - 1, 31){Builtin, None, sh_right} = 1)
			call reset.label_texts{UserDefined, Call, reset.label_texts}
		end if

end on

		else
			if((element.idx{int} {element.idx}  - scroll.up{int} {scroll.up} ) > 12)
				scroll.up{int} {scroll.up}  := (element.idx{int} {element.idx}  - 12) + 2
			end if
		end if
		call update.scrollbar{UserDefined, Call, update.scrollbar}
		call update.scrollarea{UserDefined, Call, update.scrollarea}
	end if
	call load.element{UserDefined, Call, load.element}
	if(btn_mute{int} {btn_mute}  = 1)
		call play_trans_sample{UserDefined, Call, play_trans_sample}
	end if
end on

on ui_control(sli_scrollbar{int} {sli_scrollbar} )
	if(NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} {NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS}  > 12)
		scroll.up{int} {scroll.up}  := (NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} {NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS}  - 12) - (((NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} {NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS}  - 12) * sli_scrollbar{int} {sli_scrollbar} ) / 1000000)
		scroll.up{int} {scroll.up}  := scroll.up{int} {scroll.up} 
		scroll.realup{real} {scroll.realup}  := int_to_real(scroll.up{int} {scroll.up} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}
		call update.scrollarea{UserDefined, Call, update.scrollarea}
	end if
end on

on async_complete
	if(NI_ASYNC_ID{int} {NI_ASYNC_ID}  = save_id{int} {save_id} )
		if(NI_ASYNC_EXIT_STATUS{int} {NI_ASYNC_EXIT_STATUS}  = 1)
			save_id{int} {save_id}  := -1
		else
			if(NI_ASYNC_EXIT_STATUS{int} {NI_ASYNC_EXIT_STATUS}  = 0)
				save_id{int} {save_id}  := 0
			end if
		end if
	end if
	if(NI_ASYNC_ID{int} {NI_ASYNC_ID}  = load_id{int} {load_id} )
		if(NI_ASYNC_EXIT_STATUS{int} {NI_ASYNC_EXIT_STATUS}  = 1)
			load_id{int} {load_id}  := -1
		else
			if(NI_ASYNC_EXIT_STATUS{int} {NI_ASYNC_EXIT_STATUS}  = 0)
				load_id{int} {load_id}  := 0
			end if
		end if
	end if
end on

	num_dynamic_cc{int} {num_dynamic_cc}  := get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(mnu_dynamic_cc{int} {mnu_dynamic_cc} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, get_control_par(get_ui_id(mnu_dynamic_cc{int} {mnu_dynamic_cc} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} ){Builtin, None, get_control_par}){Builtin, None, get_menu_item_value}
	call update.cc_dynamics{UserDefined, Call, update.cc_dynamics}
end on

on ui_control(btn_settings{int} {btn_settings} )
	if(btn_settings{int} {btn_settings}  = 1)
		Boolean3{int} {Boolean3}  := 0
		call all_windows.show{UserDefined, Call, all_windows.show}
		Boolean4{int} {Boolean4}  := 1
		call settings.show{UserDefined, Call, settings.show}
	else
		Boolean3{int} {Boolean3}  := 0
		call all_windows.show{UserDefined, Call, all_windows.show}
		Boolean5{int} {Boolean5}  := 1
		call home.show{UserDefined, Call, home.show}
	end if
end on

function init.arrays
	i{int} {i}  := 0
	while(i{int} {i}  <= 1999) 
		if(sus_release_time[i{int} {i} ]{int} {sus_release_time}  = 0)
			sus_release_time[i{int} {i} ]{int} {sus_release_time}  := 280
		end if
		if(trans_fadeIn_time[i{int} {i} ]{int} {trans_fadeIn_time}  = 0)
			trans_fadeIn_time[i{int} {i} ]{int} {trans_fadeIn_time}  := 780000
		end if
		if(trans_fadeOut_time[i{int} {i} ]{int} {trans_fadeOut_time}  = 0)
			trans_fadeOut_time[i{int} {i} ]{int} {trans_fadeOut_time}  := 500000
		end if
		if(trans_wait_time[i{int} {i} ]{int} {trans_wait_time}  = 0)
			trans_wait_time[i{int} {i} ]{int} {trans_wait_time}  := 696000
		end if
		if(sus_fadeIn_time[i{int} {i} ]{int} {sus_fadeIn_time}  = 0)
			sus_fadeIn_time[i{int} {i} ]{int} {sus_fadeIn_time}  := 780000
		end if
		if(trans_zone_ids[i{int} {i} ]{int} {trans_zone_ids}  = 0)
			trans_zone_ids[i{int} {i} ]{int} {trans_zone_ids}  := -1
		end if
		inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
end function

function update.mnu_rr0
	if(mnu_rr{int} {mnu_rr}  = NUM_TRANS_GROUPS{int} {NUM_TRANS_GROUPS} )
		i{int} {i}  := 0
		while(i{int} {i}  <= (NUM_TRANS_GROUPS{int} {NUM_TRANS_GROUPS}  - 1)) 
			if(in_range(Boolean4{int} {Boolean4} , _trans_ranges[i{int} {i}  * 2]{int} {_trans_ranges} , _trans_ranges[(i{int} {i}  * 2) + 1]{int} {_trans_ranges} ){Builtin, None, in_range})
				current_trans_group{int} {current_trans_group}  := trans_group{int} {trans_group}  + i{int} {i} 
			end if
			inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None, inc}
		end while
	else
		if(mnu_rr{int} {mnu_rr}  = (NUM_TRANS_GROUPS{int} {NUM_TRANS_GROUPS}  + 1))
			_trans_rr[(get_event_par(Boolean5{int} {Boolean5} , EVENT_PAR_NOTE{int} {EVENT_PAR_NOTE} ){Builtin, None, get_event_par} * 24) + (get_event_par(Boolean5{int} {Boolean5} , EVENT_PAR_VELOCITY{int} {EVENT_PAR_VELOCITY} ){Builtin, None, get_event_par} / 5)]{int} {_trans_rr}  := (_trans_rr[(get_event_par(Boolean5{int} {Boolean5} , EVENT_PAR_NOTE{int} {EVENT_PAR_NOTE} ){Builtin, None, get_event_par} * 24) + (get_event_par(Boolean5{int} {Boolean5} , EVENT_PAR_VELOCITY{int} {EVENT_PAR_VELOCITY} ){Builtin, None, get_event_par} / 5)]{int} {_trans_rr}  + 1) mod NUM_TRANS_GROUPS{int} {NUM_TRANS_GROUPS} 
			current_trans_group{int} {current_trans_group}  := trans_group{int} {trans_group}  + _trans_rr[(get_event_par(Boolean5{int} {Boolean5} , EVENT_PAR_NOTE{int} {EVENT_PAR_NOTE} ){Builtin, None, get_event_par} * 24) + (get_event_par(Boolean5{int} {Boolean5} , EVENT_PAR_VELOCITY{int} {EVENT_PAR_VELOCITY} ){Builtin, None, get_event_par} / 5)]{int} {_trans_rr} 
		else
			current_trans_group{int} {current_trans_group}  := trans_group{int} {trans_group}  + mnu_rr{int} {mnu_rr} 
		end if
	end if
end function

function get_trans_idx
	if(search(trans_zone_ids{int[]} {trans_zone_ids} , (sh_left(lsb(abs(trans_group{int} {trans_group}  - get_zone_par(get_event_par(z000{int} {z000} , EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID{int} {EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID} ){Builtin, None, get_event_par}, ZONE_PAR_GROUP{int} {ZONE_PAR_GROUP} ){Builtin, None, get_zone_par}){Builtin, None, abs}){Builtin, None, lsb}, 14){Builtin, None, sh_left} .or. sh_left(lsb(get_zone_par(get_event_par(z000{int} {z000} , EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID{int} {EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID} ){Builtin, None, get_event_par}, ZONE_PAR_HIGH_VELO{int} {ZONE_PAR_HIGH_VELO} ){Builtin, None, get_zone_par}){Builtin, None, lsb}, 7){Builtin, None, sh_left}) .or. lsb(get_zone_par(get_event_par(z000{int} {z000} , EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID{int} {EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID} ){Builtin, None, get_event_par}, ZONE_PAR_ROOT_KEY{int} {ZONE_PAR_ROOT_KEY} ){Builtin, None, get_zone_par}){Builtin, None, lsb}){Builtin, None, search} = -1)
		q000{int} {q000}  := search(trans_zone_ids{int[]} {trans_zone_ids} , -1){Builtin, None, search}
	else
		q000{int} {q000}  := search(trans_zone_ids{int[]} {trans_zone_ids} , (sh_left(lsb(abs(trans_group{int} {trans_group}  - get_zone_par(get_event_par(z000{int} {z000} , EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID{int} {EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID} ){Builtin, None, get_event_par}, ZONE_PAR_GROUP{int} {ZONE_PAR_GROUP} ){Builtin, None, get_zone_par}){Builtin, None, abs}){Builtin, None, lsb}, 14){Builtin, None, sh_left} .or. sh_left(lsb(get_zone_par(get_event_par(z000{int} {z000} , EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID{int} {EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID} ){Builtin, None, get_event_par}, ZONE_PAR_HIGH_VELO{int} {ZONE_PAR_HIGH_VELO} ){Builtin, None, get_zone_par}){Builtin, None, lsb}, 7){Builtin, None, sh_left}) .or. lsb(get_zone_par(get_event_par(z000{int} {z000} , EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID{int} {EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID} ){Builtin, None, get_event_par}, ZONE_PAR_ROOT_KEY{int} {ZONE_PAR_ROOT_KEY} ){Builtin, None, get_zone_par}){Builtin, None, lsb}){Builtin, None, search}

function update.waveform{thread-unsafe}
	transition_id{int} {transition_id}  := play_note(play_event{int} {play_event} , play_velo{int} {play_velo} , 0, -1){Builtin, None, play_note}
	change_vol(transition_id{int} {transition_id} , -200000, 0){Builtin, None, change_vol}
	set_event_par_arr(transition_id{int} {transition_id} , EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int} {EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP} , 0, ALL_GROUPS{int} {ALL_GROUPS} ){Builtin, None, set_event_par_arr}
	Boolean4{int} {Boolean4}  := play_velo{int} {play_velo} 
	Boolean5{int} {Boolean5}  := transition_id{int} {transition_id} 
	call update.mnu_rr0{UserDefined, Call, update.mnu_rr0}
	set_event_par_arr(transition_id{int} {transition_id} , EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int} {EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP} , 1, current_trans_group{int} {current_trans_group} ){Builtin, None, set_event_par_arr}
	wait(1){Builtin, None, wait}
	z000{int} {z000}  := transition_id{int} {transition_id} 
	call get_trans_idx{UserDefined, Call, get_trans_idx}
	trans_idx{int} {trans_idx}  := q000{int} {q000} 
	attach_zone(wf_transition{int} {wf_transition} , get_event_par(transition_id{int} {transition_id} , EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID{int} {EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID} ){Builtin, None, get_event_par}, 0){Builtin, None, attach_zone}
	max0{int} {max0}  := trans_idx{int} {trans_idx} 
	call get_element_idx_from_trans{UserDefined, Call, get_element_idx_from_trans}
	element.idx{int} {element.idx}  := q00{int} {q00} 
	trans_zone_ids[trans_idx{int} {trans_idx} ]{int} {trans_zone_ids}  := (sh_left(lsb(abs(trans_group{int} {trans_group}  - get_zone_par(get_event_par(transition_id{int} {transition_id} , EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID{int} {EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID} ){Builtin, None, get_event_par}, ZONE_PAR_GROUP{int} {ZONE_PAR_GROUP} ){Builtin, None, get_zone_par}){Builtin, None, abs}){Builtin, None, lsb}, 14){Builtin, None, sh_left} .or. sh_left(lsb(get_zone_par(get_event_par(transition_id{int} {transition_id} , EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID{int} {EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID} ){Builtin, None, get_event_par}, ZONE_PAR_HIGH_VELO{int} {ZONE_PAR_HIGH_VELO} ){Builtin, None, get_zone_par}){Builtin, None, lsb}, 7){Builtin, None, sh_left}) .or. lsb(get_zone_par(get_event_par(transition_id{int} {transition_id} , EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID{int} {EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID} ){Builtin, None, get_event_par}, ZONE_PAR_ROOT_KEY{int} {ZONE_PAR_ROOT_KEY} ){Builtin, None, get_zone_par}){Builtin, None, lsb}
	trans_zone_volume[trans_idx{int} {trans_idx} ]{int} {trans_zone_volume}  := get_zone_par(get_event_par(transition_id{int} {transition_id} , EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID{int} {EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID} ){Builtin, None, get_event_par}, ZONE_PAR_VOLUME{int} {ZONE_PAR_VOLUME} ){Builtin, None, get_zone_par}
	trans_zone_pan[trans_idx{int} {trans_idx} ]{int} {trans_zone_pan}  := get_zone_par(get_event_par(transition_id{int} {transition_id} , EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID{int} {EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID} ){Builtin, None, get_event_par}, ZONE_PAR_PAN{int} {ZONE_PAR_PAN} ){Builtin, None, get_zone_par}
	trans_file_names[trans_idx{int} {trans_idx} ]{string} {trans_file_names}  := get_sample(get_event_par(transition_id{int} {transition_id} , EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID{int} {EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID} ){Builtin, None, get_event_par}, NI_FILE_NAME{int} {NI_FILE_NAME} ){Builtin, None, get_sample}
	fade_out(transition_id{int} {transition_id} , 0, 1){Builtin, None, fade_out}
	call update.gui.legato{UserDefined, Call, update.gui.legato}
	call update.gui.sustain{UserDefined, Call, update.gui.sustain}

end function

function update.legatoArrays
	q0{int} {q0}  := 0
	z0{int} {z0}  := 0
	while(z0{int} {z0}  <= 1999) 
		legatoList.element_numbers[z0{int} {z0} ]{int} {legatoList.element_numbers}  := z0{int} {z0} 
		legatoList.trans_file_names[z0{int} {z0} ]{string} {legatoList.trans_file_names}  := file_names_master[z0{int} {z0} ]{string} {file_names_master} 
		legatoList.trans_zone_ids[z0{int} {z0} ]{int} {legatoList.trans_zone_ids}  := zone_ids_master[z0{int} {z0} ]{int} {zone_ids_master} 
		legatoList.marked_elements[z0{int} {z0} ]{int} {legatoList.marked_elements}  := 0
		legatoList.intervals[z0{int} {z0} ]{string} {legatoList.intervals}  := ""
		legatoList.comments[z0{int} {z0} ]{string} {legatoList.comments}  := ""
		inc(z0{int} {z0} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	z0{int} {z0}  := 0
	while(z0{int} {z0}  <= (NUM_TRANS_SAMPLES_PLAYED{int} {NUM_TRANS_SAMPLES_PLAYED}  - 1)) 
		q0{int} {q0}  := search(zone_ids_master{int[]} {zone_ids_master} , trans_zone_ids[z0{int} {z0} ]{int} {trans_zone_ids} ){Builtin, None, search}
		if(q0{int} {q0}  # -1)
			legatoList.marked_elements[q0{int} {q0} ]{int} {legatoList.marked_elements}  := marked_samples[z0{int} {z0} ]{int} {marked_samples} 
			legatoList.intervals[q0{int} {q0} ]{string} {legatoList.intervals}  := intervals[z0{int} {z0} ]{string} {intervals} 
			legatoList.comments[q0{int} {q0} ]{string} {legatoList.comments}  := sample_comments[z0{int} {z0} ]{string} {sample_comments} 
		end if
		inc(z0{int} {z0} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
end function

function update.legatoList

		end while
	end if
	scroll.up{int} {scroll.up}  := real_to_int((((scroll.realup{real} {scroll.realup}  - 0) * (int_to_real(NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} {NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS}  - 12){Builtin, None, int_to_real} - 0)) / (int_to_real(NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS_OLD{int} {NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS_OLD}  - 12){Builtin, None, int_to_real} - 0)) + 0){Builtin, None, real_to_int}

function update.lfoFreq
	i{int} {i}  := 0
	while(i{int} {i}  <= (search(vibrato_groups{int[]} {vibrato_groups} , -1){Builtin, None, search} - 1)) 
		set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INTMOD_FREQUENCY{int} {ENGINE_PAR_INTMOD_FREQUENCY} , real_to_int((((int_to_real(((sli_lfoFreq{int} {sli_lfoFreq}  + lfoRandValues[event_note{int} {event_note} ]{int} {lfoRandValues} ) * (1 + (sh_right(1000000 - (sli_lfoFreq{int} {sli_lfoFreq}  + lfoRandValues[event_note{int} {event_note} ]{int} {lfoRandValues} ), 31){Builtin, None, sh_right} .or. sh_right(sli_lfoFreq{int} {sli_lfoFreq}  + lfoRandValues[event_note{int} {event_note} ]{int} {lfoRandValues} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right}))) - (1000000 * sh_right(1000000 - (sli_lfoFreq{int} {sli_lfoFreq}  + lfoRandValues[event_note{int} {event_note} ]{int} {lfoRandValues} ), 31){Builtin, None, sh_right})){Builtin, None, int_to_real} - 0) * 200000) / 1e+06) + 450000){Builtin, None, real_to_int}, vibrato_groups[i{int} {i} ]{int} {vibrato_groups} , find_mod(vibrato_groups[i{int} {i} ]{int} {vibrato_groups} , "LFO_MULTI D"){Builtin, None, find_mod}, -1){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
		inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
end function

function update.interval_keycolor

	end while
	set_key_color(Boolean3{int} {Boolean3} , KEY_COLOR_BLUE{int} {KEY_COLOR_BLUE} ){Builtin, None, set_key_color}
	set_key_color(note20{int} {note20} , KEY_COLOR_BLUE{int} {KEY_COLOR_BLUE} ){Builtin, None, set_key_color}
end function

function update.keycolor
	keys{int} {keys}  := 0
	while(keys{int} {keys}  <= 127) 
		set_key_color(keys{int} {keys} , KEY_COLOR_INACTIVE{int} {KEY_COLOR_INACTIVE} ){Builtin, None, set_key_color}
		if(in_range(keys{int} {keys} , range[0]{int} {range} , range[1]{int} {range} ){Builtin, None, in_range})
			set_key_color(keys{int} {keys} , KEY_COLOR_DEFAULT{int} {KEY_COLOR_DEFAULT} ){Builtin, None, set_key_color}
		end if
		inc(keys{int} {keys} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
end function

	end if

function update.preset_button_focus
	if(element.idx{int} {element.idx}  # -1)
		btn_elements_onoff[element.idx{int} {element.idx} ]{int} {btn_elements_onoff}  := 1
		if(not in_range(element.idx{int} {element.idx} , scroll.up{int} {scroll.up} , scroll.up{int} {scroll.up}  + 12){Builtin, None, in_range})
			scroll.up{int} {scroll.up}  := element.idx{int} {element.idx}  - 5
		end if
		if((element.idx{int} {element.idx}  - 2) <= scroll.up{int} {scroll.up} )
			scroll.up{int} {scroll.up}  := element.idx{int} {element.idx}  - 2
		else
			if((element.idx{int} {element.idx}  + 2) > ((scroll.up{int} {scroll.up}  + 12) - 1))
				scroll.up{int} {scroll.up}  := (element.idx{int} {element.idx}  + 2) - 11
			end if
		end if
		scroll.up{int} {scroll.up}  := (scroll.up{int} {scroll.up}  * (1 + (sh_right((NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} {NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS}  - 12) - scroll.up{int} {scroll.up} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right} .or. sh_right(scroll.up{int} {scroll.up} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right}))) - ((NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} {NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS}  - 12) * sh_right((NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} {NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS}  - 12) - scroll.up{int} {scroll.up} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right})
	end if
end function

function update.scrollbar
	sli_scrollbar{int} {sli_scrollbar}  := 1000000 - ((1000000 / (NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} {NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS}  - 12)) * scroll.up{int} {scroll.up} )
end function

function load.element{thread-unsafe}
	play_event{int} {play_event}  := lsb(legatoList.trans_zone_ids[element.idx{int} {element.idx} ]{int} {legatoList.trans_zone_ids} ){Builtin, None, lsb}
	play_velo{int} {play_velo}  := msb(legatoList.trans_zone_ids[element.idx{int} {element.idx} ]{int} {legatoList.trans_zone_ids} ){Builtin, None, msb}
	current_trans_group{int} {current_trans_group}  := trans_group{int} {trans_group}  + legatoList.trans_zone_groups[element.idx{int} {element.idx} ]{int} {legatoList.trans_zone_groups} 
	mnu_rr{int} {mnu_rr}  := legatoList.trans_zone_groups[element.idx{int} {element.idx} ]{int} {legatoList.trans_zone_groups} 
	transition_id{int} {transition_id}  := play_note(play_event{int} {play_event} , play_velo{int} {play_velo} , 0, -1){Builtin, None, play_note}
	change_vol(transition_id{int} {transition_id} , -200000, 0){Builtin, None, change_vol}
	set_event_par_arr(transition_id{int} {transition_id} , EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int} {EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP} , 0, ALL_GROUPS{int} {ALL_GROUPS} ){Builtin, None, set_event_par_arr}
	set_event_par_arr(transition_id{int} {transition_id} , EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int} {EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP} , 1, current_trans_group{int} {current_trans_group} ){Builtin, None, set_event_par_arr}
	wait(1){Builtin, None, wait}
	z000{int} {z000}  := transition_id{int} {transition_id} 
	call get_trans_idx{UserDefined, Call, get_trans_idx}
	trans_idx{int} {trans_idx}  := q000{int} {q000} 
	attach_zone(wf_transition{int} {wf_transition} , get_event_par(transition_id{int} {transition_id} , EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID{int} {EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID} ){Builtin, None, get_event_par}, 0){Builtin, None, attach_zone}
	trans_zone_ids[trans_idx{int} {trans_idx} ]{int} {trans_zone_ids}  := legatoList.trans_zone_ids[element.idx{int} {element.idx} ]{int} {legatoList.trans_zone_ids} 
	trans_zone_volume[trans_idx{int} {trans_idx} ]{int} {trans_zone_volume}  := get_zone_par(get_event_par(transition_id{int} {transition_id} , EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID{int} {EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID} ){Builtin, None, get_event_par}, ZONE_PAR_VOLUME{int} {ZONE_PAR_VOLUME} ){Builtin, None, get_zone_par}
	trans_zone_pan[trans_idx{int} {trans_idx} ]{int} {trans_zone_pan}  := get_zone_par(get_event_par(transition_id{int} {transition_id} , EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID{int} {EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID} ){Builtin, None, get_event_par}, ZONE_PAR_PAN{int} {ZONE_PAR_PAN} ){Builtin, None, get_zone_par}
	trans_file_names[trans_idx{int} {trans_idx} ]{string} {trans_file_names}  := get_sample(get_event_par(transition_id{int} {transition_id} , EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID{int} {EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID} ){Builtin, None, get_event_par}, NI_FILE_NAME{int} {NI_FILE_NAME} ){Builtin, None, get_sample}
	note_off(transition_id{int} {transition_id} ){Builtin, None, note_off}
	call update.gui.legato{UserDefined, Call, update.gui.legato}
	call update.gui.sustain{UserDefined, Call, update.gui.sustain}
	call reset.label_texts{UserDefined, Call, reset.label_texts}
	Boolean3{int} {Boolean3}  := played_interval[0]{int} {played_interval} 
	note20{int} {note20}  := played_interval[1]{int} {played_interval} 
	call update.interval_keycolor{UserDefined, Call, update.interval_keycolor}
end function

function get_trans_idx_from_element
	if(search(trans_zone_ids{int[]} {trans_zone_ids} , legatoList.trans_zone_ids[q00{int} {q00} ]{int} {legatoList.trans_zone_ids} ){Builtin, None, search} = -1)
		max0{int} {max0}  := search(trans_zone_ids{int[]} {trans_zone_ids} , -1){Builtin, None, search}
	else
		max0{int} {max0}  := search(trans_zone_ids{int[]} {trans_zone_ids} , legatoList.trans_zone_ids[q00{int} {q00} ]{int} {legatoList.trans_zone_ids} ){Builtin, None, search}
	end if
end function

function doubleclick_check{thread-unsafe}
	wait(402000){Builtin, None, wait}
	if((ENGINE_UPTIME{int} {ENGINE_UPTIME}  - clicktime[1]{int} {clicktime} ) > 400)
		set_control_par(group_idx0[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 1000]{int} {group_idx0} , CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HIDE} , HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int} {HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
		clicktime[2]{int} {clicktime}  := 0
	end if
end function

function update.rateEnv
	i{int} {i}  := 0
	while(i{int} {i}  <= (search(vibrato_groups{int[]} {vibrato_groups} , -1){Builtin, None, search} - 1)) 
		set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY{int} {ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY} , real_to_int((((int_to_real(sli_rateEnv{int} {sli_rateEnv} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real} - 0) * 350000) / 1e+06) + 0){Builtin, None, real_to_int}, vibrato_groups[i{int} {i} ]{int} {vibrato_groups} , find_mod(vibrato_groups[i{int} {i} ]{int} {vibrato_groups} , "ENV_AHDSR"){Builtin, None, find_mod}, find_target(vibrato_groups[i{int} {i} ]{int} {vibrato_groups} , find_mod(vibrato_groups[i{int} {i} ]{int} {vibrato_groups} , "ENV_AHDSR"){Builtin, None, find_mod}, "ENV_AHDSR" & "_FREQUENCY"){Builtin, None, find_target}){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
		inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
end function

function update.preset.menu

	end if
	i{int} {i}  := 0
	while(i{int} {i}  <= 99) 
		if(i{int} {i}  < presetCount{int} {presetCount} )
			set_menu_item_str(get_ui_id(mnu_preset{int} {mnu_preset} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, i{int} {i} , vibPresetNames[i{int} {i} ]{string} {vibPresetNames} ){Builtin, None, set_menu_item_str}

		end if

end function

	tbl_rate.curve{int} {tbl_rate.curve}  := sli_envRateCurve{int} {sli_envRateCurve}

	tbl_rate.hold{int} {tbl_rate.hold}  := (sli_envRateHold{int} {sli_envRateHold}  * 18) / 1000000

	tbl_rate.release{real} {tbl_rate.release}  := 30200

			tbl_int.env_array[i{int} {i} ]{real} {tbl_int.env_array}  := (int_to_real(tbl_int.linCurve[i{int} {i} ]{int} {tbl_int.linCurve} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real} * ((((int_to_real(((tbl_int.curve{int} {tbl_int.curve}  * (1 + (sh_right(1000000 - tbl_int.curve{int} {tbl_int.curve} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right} .or. sh_right(tbl_int.curve{int} {tbl_int.curve}  - 500000, 31){Builtin, None, sh_right}))) - (500000 * sh_right(tbl_int.curve{int} {tbl_int.curve}  - 500000, 31){Builtin, None, sh_right})) - (1000000 * sh_right(1000000 - tbl_int.curve{int} {tbl_int.curve} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right})){Builtin, None, int_to_real} - 500000) * -1) / 500000) + 1)) + (int_to_real(tbl_int.logCurve[i{int} {i} ]{int} {tbl_int.logCurve} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real} * ((((int_to_real(((tbl_int.curve{int} {tbl_int.curve}  * (1 + (sh_right(1000000 - tbl_int.curve{int} {tbl_int.curve} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right} .or. sh_right(tbl_int.curve{int} {tbl_int.curve}  - 500000, 31){Builtin, None, sh_right}))) - (500000 * sh_right(tbl_int.curve{int} {tbl_int.curve}  - 500000, 31){Builtin, None, sh_right})) - (1000000 * sh_right(1000000 - tbl_int.curve{int} {tbl_int.curve} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right})){Builtin, None, int_to_real} - 500000) * 1) / 500000) + 0))
		end if
		if(i{int} {i}  > (tbl_int.attack_idx{int} {tbl_int.attack_idx}  + tbl_int.hold{int} {tbl_int.hold} ))
			tbl_int.env_array[i{int} {i} ]{real} {tbl_int.env_array}  := int_to_real(tbl_int.decayCurve[i{int} {i}  - (tbl_int.attack_idx{int} {tbl_int.attack_idx}  + tbl_int.hold{int} {tbl_int.hold} )]{int} {tbl_int.decayCurve} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}
		end if
		inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	i{int} {i}  := 0
	while(i{int} {i}  <= (num_elements(tbl_int.env_array{real[]} {tbl_int.env_array} ){Builtin, None, num_elements} - 1)) 
		tbl_int.releaseCurve[i{int} {i} ]{int} {tbl_int.releaseCurve}  := (tbl_int.releaseCurve[i{int} {i} ]{int} {tbl_int.releaseCurve}  * real_to_int(tbl_int.env_array[tbl_int.release_idx{int} {tbl_int.release_idx} ]{real} {tbl_int.env_array} ){Builtin, None, real_to_int}) / 1000
		inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	i{int} {i}  := 0
	while(i{int} {i}  <= (num_elements(tbl_int.env_array{real[]} {tbl_int.env_array} ){Builtin, None, num_elements} - 1)) 
		if(i{int} {i}  > tbl_int.release_idx{int} {tbl_int.release_idx} )
			tbl_int.env_array[i{int} {i} ]{real} {tbl_int.env_array}  := int_to_real(tbl_int.releaseCurve[i{int} {i}  - tbl_int.release_idx{int} {tbl_int.release_idx} ]{int} {tbl_int.releaseCurve} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}
		end if
		inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	i{int} {i}  := 0
	while(i{int} {i}  <= 124) 
		tbl_int1[i{int} {i} ]{int} {tbl_int1}  := (((real_to_int(tbl_int.env_array[i{int} {i} ]{real} {tbl_int.env_array} ){Builtin, None, real_to_int} * (1 + (sh_right(1000 - real_to_int(tbl_int.env_array[i{int} {i} ]{real} {tbl_int.env_array} ){Builtin, None, real_to_int}, 31){Builtin, None, sh_right} .or. sh_right(real_to_int(tbl_int.env_array[i{int} {i} ]{real} {tbl_int.env_array} ){Builtin, None, real_to_int}, 31){Builtin, None, sh_right}))) - (1000 * sh_right(1000 - real_to_int(tbl_int.env_array[i{int} {i} ]{real} {tbl_int.env_array} ){Builtin, None, real_to_int}, 31){Builtin, None, sh_right})) * 880) / 1000
		tbl_int2[i{int} {i} ]{int} {tbl_int2}  := tbl_int1[i{int} {i} ]{int} {tbl_int1} 
		inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	call update.rateEnv{UserDefined, Call, update.rateEnv}
	call update.intEnv{UserDefined, Call, update.intEnv}
	call update.gainModulation{UserDefined, Call, update.gainModulation}
	call update.pitchModulation{UserDefined, Call, update.pitchModulation}
	call update.lfoFreq{UserDefined, Call, update.lfoFreq}
	call update.lfoRand{UserDefined, Call, update.lfoRand}
	call update.lfoFadeIn{UserDefined, Call, update.lfoFadeIn}
	call update.eqFreq{UserDefined, Call, update.eqFreq}
	call update.eqBandwidth{UserDefined, Call, update.eqBandwidth}
	call update.eqGain{UserDefined, Call, update.eqGain}
	call update.vibIntensity{UserDefined, Call, update.vibIntensity}
end function

function get.presetCount
	presetCount{int} {presetCount}  := search(vibPresetCount{int[]} {vibPresetCount} , 0){Builtin, None, search}
	presetCount{int} {presetCount}  := (presetCount{int} {presetCount}  * (1 + (sh_right(100 - presetCount{int} {presetCount} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right} .or. sh_right(presetCount{int} {presetCount} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right}))) - (100 * sh_right(100 - presetCount{int} {presetCount} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right})
end function
